title: TLS Certificate Mismatch or Trust Concern
description: TLS analysis identified hostname mismatch or self-signed certificate characteristics on an externally reachable service.
impact: Certificate trust issues can weaken client assurance, hide origin misrouting, and increase the chance of unsafe exception handling by users or systems.
likelihood: Medium because impact depends on whether the endpoint is user-facing or operationally relied upon.
recommendations: Issue certificates that match the externally reachable hostname set.
Remove self-signed certificates from production-facing services unless explicitly pinned and justified.
Validate SNI, host routing, and certificate deployment across edge tiers.
